text.*:
Mahogany Homes Reward Shop
Estate Agents Shop
Release16 November 2020 (Update)
MembersYes
Shop typeMinigames
LocationVarious
OwnerEstate agent
[view] • [talk]

Estate Agents Shop can be accessed from any of the five estate agents in Varrock, Seers' Village, Falador, Ardougne, or Prifddinas. It was released alongside Construction Contracts on 16 November 2020.

Players can spend the contract credits earned from completing contracts (which requires at least level 40 Construction) in this shop.

  • Basic plank - 1 credit per contract
  • Oak plank - 2 credits per contract
  • Teak plank - 3 credits per contract
  • Mahogany plank - 5 credits per contract

Each master constructor's outfit piece takes 50 contracts using mahogany planks, 84 contracts with teak, 125 contracts with oak, or 250 contracts with basic planks. Purchasing every reward from the shop requires 1,750 credits, which requires completing at least 350 contracts, as each contract yields a maximum of five credits without a Construction contract enhancer.
